title: ExperiencePropertyTypeBundle (Beta) - Metadata API
description: Represents a property type. Replaced in Spring ’26 by the updated LightningPropertyType. When you create a custom property type for a Lightning web component, use LightningPropertyType instead, and deploy that bundle to your org.
file_information:
ExperiencePropertyTypeBundle components are stored in the experiencePropertyTypeBundles folder. Here’s an example of how the folder is structured.

```
+--myMetadataPackage
    +--experiencePropertyTypeBundles (1)
        +--addressProperty (2)
            +--schema.json (3)
            +--design.json (4)
```

- In the experiencePropertyTypeBundles folder (1) is a folder for each custom property type.
- Each custom property type folder is named in the format propertyTypeName. In this example (2), the name is addressProperty.
- Each propertyTypeName folder contains a JSON file or files that define the property type. A schema.json file (3), which is a JSON schema that drives the property type validation An optional design.json file (4), which provides the user experience and property editor information for that property type
- A schema.json file (3), which is a JSON schema that drives the property type validation
- An optional design.json file (4), which provides the user experience and property editor information for that property type

description.description: Explanatory text about the property type.

masterLabel.description: A user-friendly name for ExperiencePropertyTypeBundle, which is defined when the ExperiencePropertyTypeBundle is created.

resources.description: A list of source files in the experiencePropertyTypeBundles folder.

fileName.description: The file name of the resource.

filePath.description: The file path of the resource.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="ExperiencePropertyTypeBundle">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="description" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="masterLabel" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="resources" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:ExperiencePropertyTypeBundleResource"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="ExperiencePropertyTypeBundleResource">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fileName" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="filePath" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="source" type="xsd:base64Binary"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
```

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: This example shows the directory structure in the .zip file of a property type named addressProperty.
